Achilleas Athanasiou Fragkoulis

Data Scientist - Machine Learning Engineer

Hi there 👋

I’m a data scientist currently working at Rimo3. Trying to solve some of the tough challenges around software packaging, testing and deployment automation!

I’m passionate about:

  • Reinforcement learning 🤖
  • ML Engineering & ML Ops ☁️🚀
  • Experimentation 🔬

What I’m working on at the moment

Currently I am working on domain-specific applications of computer vision for object detection & recognition and building reinforcement learning agents that can intelligently interact with the contextual environment to automate repetitive human tasks in IT.

Profession Experience

I have professional experience in experimentation (Frequentist & Bayesian), both for multivariate (A/B/n) testing and Multi-Armed Bandit experiments, with a strong focus on testing of ML solutions to understand and measure user-facing impact.

I’ve been involved in developing and productionizing a large-scale experimentation platform on the cloud, along with a major tech-stack migration from on-premise to the cloud.

Volunteering

Additionally I’ve been involved in pro-bono projects with UCL’s Analytics for Social Impact Society making analytics & data-science accessible to charities for free.

While I’ve also delivered the Data Analytics for Managers course at Product School in 2019.

A few words about where I come from

I have a background in Experimental High Energy Particle Physics, having spent some time doing research with groups affiliated with DESY & CERN.

My professional experience is very mixed, with my first stint being involved in setting up a food & drink distribution company from the ground up - Ormos.

I’ve also worked in travel for Hotels.com (part of Expedia Group). And I’m currently working in IT Rimo3.

…and the fun tidbits

I spend most of my free time chasing wind and waves for kitesurfing or riding bicycles & crotch rockets!

For more information about me, see my CV
